textAr: يسٓ
textEn: Yā Sīn
textTranslit: Yaa-Seeen

textAr: وَٱلْقُرْءَانِ ٱلْحَكِيمِ
textEn: By the Qur’an, full of wisdom,
textTranslit: Wal-Qur-aanil-Hakeem

textAr: إِنَّكَ لَمِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
textEn: You [O Muhammad] are indeed one of the messengers,
textTranslit: Innaka laminal mursaleen

textAr: عَلَىٰ صِرَٰطٍ مُّسْتَقِيمٍ
textEn: on a straight path,
textTranslit: 'Alaa Siraatim Mustaqeem

textAr: تَنزِيلَ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ
textEn: [This is] a revelation from the All-Mighty, Most Merciful,
textTranslit: Tanzeelal 'Azeezir Raheem

textAr: لِتُنذِرَ قَوْمًا مَّآ أُنذِرَ ءَابَآؤُهُمْ فَهُمْ غَـٰفِلُونَ
textEn: so that you warn a people whose forefathers were not warned, so they are heedless.
textTranslit: Litunzira qawmam maaa unzira aabaaa'uhum fahum ghaafiloon

textAr: لَقَدْ حَقَّ ٱلْقَوْلُ عَلَىٰٓ أَكْثَرِهِمْ فَهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
textEn: The decree [of punishment] has been passed against most of them, for they will not believe.
textTranslit: Laqad haqqal qawlu 'alaaa aksarihim fahum laa yu'minoon

textAr: إِنَّا جَعَلْنَا فِىٓ أَعْنَـٰقِهِمْ أَغْلَـٰلًا فَهِىَ إِلَى ٱلْأَذْقَانِ فَهُم مُّقْمَحُونَ
textEn: [It is as if] We have placed shackles around their necks up to their chins, so their heads are forced to remain up,
textTranslit: Innaa ja'alnaa feee a'naaqihim aghlaalan fahiya ilal azqaani fahum muqmahoon

textAr: وَجَعَلْنَا مِنۢ بَيْنِ أَيْدِيهِمْ سَدًّا وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِمْ سَدًّا فَأَغْشَيْنَـٰهُمْ فَهُمْ لَا يُبْصِرُونَ
textEn: and We have placed a barrier before them and a barrier behind them, and have blocked their vision so they cannot see.
textTranslit: Wa ja'alnaa mim baini aydeehim saddanw-wa min khalfihim saddan fa aghshai naahum fahum laa yubsiroon

textAr: وَسَوَآءٌ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَأَنذَرْتَهُمْ أَمْ لَمْ تُنذِرْهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
textEn: It is the same to them whether you warn them or not, they will not believe.
textTranslit: Wa sawaaa'un 'alaihim 'a-anzartahum am lam tunzirhum laa yu'minoon

textAr: إِنَّمَا تُنذِرُ مَنِ ٱتَّبَعَ ٱلذِّكْرَ وَخَشِىَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنَ بِٱلْغَيْبِ ۖ فَبَشِّرْهُ بِمَغْفِرَةٍ وَأَجْرٍ كَرِيمٍ
textEn: You can only warn one who follows the Reminder and fears the Most Compassionate unseen. So give him glad tidings of forgiveness and a generous reward.
textTranslit: Innamaa tunziru manit taba 'az-Zikra wa khashiyar Rahmaana bilghaib, fabashshirhu bimaghfiratinw-wa ajrin kareem

textAr: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نُحْىِ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ وَنَكْتُبُ مَا قَدَّمُوا۟ وَءَاثَـٰرَهُمْ ۚ وَكُلَّ شَىْءٍ أَحْصَيْنَـٰهُ فِىٓ إِمَامٍ مُّبِينٍ
textEn: It is We Who give life to the dead, and record what they send forth and what they leave behind, and We keep an account of everything in a clear Record.
textTranslit: Innaa Nahnu nuhyil mawtaa wa naktubu maa qaddamoo wa aasaarahum; wa kulla shai'in ahsainaahu feee Imaamim Mubeen

textAr: وَٱضْرِبْ لَهُم مَّثَلًا أَصْحَـٰبَ ٱلْقَرْيَةِ إِذْ جَآءَهَا ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
textEn: Give them an example of the People of the Town when the messengers came to it.
textTranslit: Wadrib lahum masalan Ashaabal Qaryatih; iz jaaa'ahal mursaloon

textAr: إِذْ أَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَيْهِمُ ٱثْنَيْنِ فَكَذَّبُوهُمَا فَعَزَّزْنَا بِثَالِثٍ فَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّآ إِلَيْكُم مُّرْسَلُونَ
textEn: When We sent them two [messengers], but they rejected them, so We strengthened them with a third, and they said, “We are sent to you as messengers.”
textTranslit: Iz arsalnaaa ilaihimusnaini fakazzaboohumaa fa'azzaznaa bisaalisin faqaalooo innaaa ilaikum mursaloon

textAr: قَالُوا۟ مَآ أَنتُمْ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُنَا وَمَآ أَنزَلَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ مِن شَىْءٍ إِنْ أَنتُمْ إِلَّا تَكْذِبُونَ
textEn: They said, “You are no more than human beings like us, and the Most Compassionate has not sent down anything. You are simply lying.”
textTranslit: Qaaloo maaa antum illaa basharum mislunaa wa maaa anzalar Rahmaanu min shai'in in antum illaa takziboon

textAr: قَالُوا۟ رَبُّنَا يَعْلَمُ إِنَّآ إِلَيْكُمْ لَمُرْسَلُونَ
textEn: They said, “Our Lord knows that we are sent to you as messengers.
textTranslit: Qaaloo Rabbunaa ya'lamu innaaa ilaikum lamursaloon

textAr: وَمَا عَلَيْنَآ إِلَّا ٱلْبَلَـٰغُ ٱلْمُبِينُ
textEn: Our duty is only to convey the message clearly.”
textTranslit: Wa maa 'alainaaa illal balaaghul mubeen

textAr: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا تَطَيَّرْنَا بِكُمْ ۖ لَئِن لَّمْ تَنتَهُوا۟ لَنَرْجُمَنَّكُمْ وَلَيَمَسَّنَّكُم مِّنَّا عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
textEn: The people said, “We consider you as an evil omen. If you do not desist, we will surely stone you, and we will inflict upon you a painful punishment.”
textTranslit: Qaaloo innaa tataiyarnaa bikum la'il-lam tantahoo lanar jumannakum wa la-yamassan nakum minnaa 'azaabun aleem

textAr: قَالُوا۟ طَـٰٓئِرُكُم مَّعَكُمْ ۚ أَئِن ذُكِّرْتُم ۚ بَلْ أَنتُمْ قَوْمٌ مُّسْرِفُونَ
textEn: The messengers said, “Your evil omen is with yourselves [because of your disbelief]. Is it because you are admonished? Rather, you are a people who transgress all bounds.”
textTranslit: Qaaloo taaa'irukum ma'akum; a'in zukkirtum; bal antum qawmum musrifoon

textAr: وَجَآءَ مِنْ أَقْصَا ٱلْمَدِينَةِ رَجُلٌ يَسْعَىٰ قَالَ يَـٰقَوْمِ ٱتَّبِعُوا۟ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
textEn: A man came from the farthest end of the city, rushing, and said, “O my people, follow the messengers.
textTranslit: Wa jaaa'a min aqsal madeenati rajuluny yas'aa qaala yaa qawmit tabi'ul mursaleen

textAr: ٱتَّبِعُوا۟ مَن لَّا يَسْـَٔلُكُمْ أَجْرًا وَهُم مُّهْتَدُونَ
textEn: Follow those who ask no recompense of you, and who are guided.
textTranslit: Ittabi'oo mal-laa yas'alukum ajranw-wa hum muhtadoon

textAr: وَمَا لِىَ لَآ أَعْبُدُ ٱلَّذِى فَطَرَنِى وَإِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ
textEn: Why should I not worship the One Who created me and to Whom you will all be brought back?
textTranslit: Wa maa liya laaa a'budul lazee fataranee wa ilaihi turja'oon

textAr: ءَأَتَّخِذُ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ ءَالِهَةً إِن يُرِدْنِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ بِضُرٍّ لَّا تُغْنِ عَنِّى شَفَـٰعَتُهُمْ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا يُنقِذُونِ
textEn: Should I take besides Him other gods whose intercession cannot avail me in the least, nor can they come to my rescue, if the Most Compassionate wills to harm me?
textTranslit: 'A-attakhizu min dooniheee aalihatan iny-yuridnir Rahmaanu bidurril-laa tughni 'annee shafaa 'atuhum shai 'anw-wa laa yunqizoon

textAr: إِنِّىٓ إِذًا لَّفِى ضَلَـٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ
textEn: Surely I would then be clearly misguided.
textTranslit: Inneee izal-lafee dalaa-lim-mubeen

textAr: إِنِّىٓ ءَامَنتُ بِرَبِّكُمْ فَٱسْمَعُونِ
textEn: I believe in your Lord, so listen to me.”
textTranslit: Inneee aamantu bi Rabbikum fasma'oon

textAr: قِيلَ ٱدْخُلِ ٱلْجَنَّةَ ۖ قَالَ يَـٰلَيْتَ قَوْمِى يَعْلَمُونَ
textEn: [But they killed him], so he was told, “Enter Paradise.” He said, “If only my people knew
textTranslit: Qeelad khulil Jannnah; qaala yaa laita qawmee ya'lamoon

textAr: بِمَا غَفَرَ لِى رَبِّى وَجَعَلَنِى مِنَ ٱلْمُكْرَمِينَ
textEn: of how my Lord has forgiven me, and made me among the honored ones.”
textTranslit: Bimaa ghafara lee Rabbee wa ja'alanee minal mukrameen

textAr: ۞ وَمَآ أَنزَلْنَا عَلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦ مِنۢ بَعْدِهِۦ مِن جُندٍ مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَمَا كُنَّا مُنزِلِينَ
textEn: After his death, We did not send down any soldiers from heaven against his people, nor would We have done so.
textTranslit: Wa maaa anzalnaa 'alaa qawmihee mim ba'dihee min jundim minas-samaaa'i wa maa kunnaa munzileen

textAr: إِن كَانَتْ إِلَّا صَيْحَةً وَٰحِدَةً فَإِذَا هُمْ خَـٰمِدُونَ
textEn: It was no more than a single blast, and immediately they were extinguished.
textTranslit: In kaanat illaa saihatanw waahidatan fa-izaa hum khaamidoon

textAr: يَـٰحَسْرَةً عَلَى ٱلْعِبَادِ ۚ مَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
textEn: Alas for the humans! No messenger ever comes to them but they ridicule him.
textTranslit: Yaa hasratan 'alal 'ibaad; maa yaateehim mir Rasoolin illaa kaanoo bihee yastahzi 'oon

textAr: أَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْقُرُونِ أَنَّهُمْ إِلَيْهِمْ لَا يَرْجِعُونَ
textEn: Do they not see how many generations We destroyed before them who will never come back to them?
textTranslit: Alam yaraw kam ahlak naa qablahum minal qurooni annahum ilaihim laa yarji'oon

textAr: وَإِن كُلٌّ لَّمَّا جَمِيعٌ لَّدَيْنَا مُحْضَرُونَ
textEn: Yet all of them will be brought before Us.
textTranslit: Wa in kullul lammaa jamee'ul-ladainaa muhdaroon

textAr: وَءَايَةٌ لَّهُمُ ٱلْأَرْضُ ٱلْمَيْتَةُ أَحْيَيْنَـٰهَا وَأَخْرَجْنَا مِنْهَا حَبًّا فَمِنْهُ يَأْكُلُونَ
textEn: There is a sign for them in the dead land: We give it life and produce from it grain for them to eat.
textTranslit: Wa Aayatul lahumul ardul maitatu ahyainaahaa wa akhrajnaa minhaa habban faminhu yaakuloon

textAr: وَجَعَلْنَا فِيهَا جَنَّـٰتٍ مِّن نَّخِيلٍ وَأَعْنَـٰبٍ وَفَجَّرْنَا فِيهَا مِنَ ٱلْعُيُونِ
textEn: And We have made therein gardens of palm trees and grapevines, and caused springs to gush forth,
textTranslit: Wa ja'alnaa feehaa jannaatim min nakheelinw wa a'naabinw wa fajjarnaa feeha minal 'uyoon

textAr: لِيَأْكُلُوا۟ مِن ثَمَرِهِۦ وَمَا عَمِلَتْهُ أَيْدِيهِمْ ۖ أَفَلَا يَشْكُرُونَ
textEn: so that they may eat of its fruit that was not made by their hands. Will they not then give thanks?
textTranslit: Liyaakuloo min samarihee wa maa 'amilat-hu aideehim; afalaa yashkuroon

textAr: سُبْحَـٰنَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلْأَزْوَٰجَ كُلَّهَا مِمَّا تُنۢبِتُ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَمِنْ أَنفُسِهِمْ وَمِمَّا لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
textEn: Glory be to the One Who created all types of things that the earth produces, and of themselves, and of things that they have no knowledge about.
textTranslit: Subhaanal lazee khalaqal azwaaja kullahaa mimmaa tumbitul ardu wa min anfusihim wa mimmaa laa ya'lamoon

textAr: وَءَايَةٌ لَّهُمُ ٱلَّيْلُ نَسْلَخُ مِنْهُ ٱلنَّهَارَ فَإِذَا هُم مُّظْلِمُونَ
textEn: There is another sign for them in the night: We strip from it the daylight, and they are left in darkness.
textTranslit: Wa Aayatul lahumul lailu naslakhu minhun nahaara fa-izaa hum muzlimoon

textAr: وَٱلشَّمْسُ تَجْرِى لِمُسْتَقَرٍّ لَّهَا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ تَقْدِيرُ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْعَلِيمِ
textEn: The sun is running to its determined course. That is the design of the All-Mighty, All-Knowing.
textTranslit: Wash-shamsu tajree limustaqarril lahaa; zaalika taqdeerul 'Azeezil Aleem

textAr: وَٱلْقَمَرَ قَدَّرْنَـٰهُ مَنَازِلَ حَتَّىٰ عَادَ كَٱلْعُرْجُونِ ٱلْقَدِيمِ
textEn: As for the moon, We have determined phases for it, until it becomes like an old palm stalk.
textTranslit: Walqamara qaddarnaahu manaazila hattaa 'aada kal'ur joonil qadeem

textAr: لَا ٱلشَّمْسُ يَنۢبَغِى لَهَآ أَن تُدْرِكَ ٱلْقَمَرَ وَلَا ٱلَّيْلُ سَابِقُ ٱلنَّهَارِ ۚ وَكُلٌّ فِى فَلَكٍ يَسْبَحُونَ
textEn: It is not for the sun to catch up with the moon, nor for the night to outstrip the day. Each is floating in its own orbit.
textTranslit: Lash shamsu yambaghee lahaaa an tudrikal qamara wa lal lailu saabiqun nahaar; wa kullun fee falaki yasbahoon

textAr: وَءَايَةٌ لَّهُمْ أَنَّا حَمَلْنَا ذُرِّيَّتَهُمْ فِى ٱلْفُلْكِ ٱلْمَشْحُونِ
textEn: Another sign for them is that We carried their offspring in the loaded Ark,
textTranslit: Wa Aayatul lahum annaa hamalnaa zurriyatahum fil fulkil mashhoon

textAr: وَخَلَقْنَا لَهُم مِّن مِّثْلِهِۦ مَا يَرْكَبُونَ
textEn: and We created for them similar things on which they ride.
textTranslit: Wa khalaqnaa lahum mim-mislihee maa yarkaboon

textAr: وَإِن نَّشَأْ نُغْرِقْهُمْ فَلَا صَرِيخَ لَهُمْ وَلَا هُمْ يُنقَذُونَ
textEn: If We willed, We could drown them, then there would be no one to respond to their cry, nor could they be rescued,
textTranslit: Wa in nashaa nughriqhum falaa sareekha lahum wa laa hum yunqazoon

textAr: إِلَّا رَحْمَةً مِّنَّا وَمَتَـٰعًا إِلَىٰ حِينٍ
textEn: except by a mercy from Us, leaving them to enjoy for a while.
textTranslit: Illaa rahmatam minnaa wa mataa'an ilaa heen

textAr: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمُ ٱتَّقُوا۟ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيكُمْ وَمَا خَلْفَكُمْ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُرْحَمُونَ
textEn: When it is said to them, “Beware of what is ahead of you and what is behind you, so that you may be shown mercy.”
textTranslit: Wa izaa qeela lahumuttaqoo maa baina aideekum wa maa khalfakum la'allakum turhamoon

textAr: وَمَا تَأْتِيهِم مِّنْ ءَايَةٍ مِّنْ ءَايَـٰتِ رَبِّهِمْ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ عَنْهَا مُعْرِضِينَ
textEn: No sign ever comes to them from their Lord except that they turn away from it.
textTranslit: Wa maa taateehim min aayatim min ayataati Rabbihim illaa kaanoo 'anhaa mu'rideen

textAr: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ أَنفِقُوا۟ مِمَّا رَزَقَكُمُ ٱللَّهُ قَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ أَنُطْعِمُ مَن لَّوْ يَشَآءُ ٱللَّهُ أَطْعَمَهُۥٓ إِنْ أَنتُمْ إِلَّا فِى ضَلَـٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ
textEn: And when it is said to them, “Spend of what Allah has provided you with”, the disbelievers say to the believers, “Should we feed those whom Allah could feed if He willed? You are clearly misguided!”
textTranslit: Wa izaa qeela lahum anfiqoo mimmaa razaqakumul laahu qaalal lazeena kafaroo lillazeena aamanooo anut'imu mal-law yashaaa'ul laahu at'amahooo in antum illaa fee dalaalim mubeen

textAr: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هَـٰذَا ٱلْوَعْدُ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ
textEn: They say, “When will this promise come to pass, if you are truthful?”
textTranslit: Wa yaqooloona mataa haazal wa'du in kuntum saadiqeen

textAr: مَا يَنظُرُونَ إِلَّا صَيْحَةً وَٰحِدَةً تَأْخُذُهُمْ وَهُمْ يَخِصِّمُونَ
textEn: They are not awaiting but a single Blast that will seize them while they are still disputing.
textTranslit: Maa yanzuroona illaa saihatanw waahidatan taa khuzuhum wa hum yakhissimoon

textAr: فَلَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ تَوْصِيَةً وَلَآ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِمْ يَرْجِعُونَ
textEn: Then they will not be able to make a will, nor will they be able to return to their households.
textTranslit: Falaa yastatee'oona taw siyatanw-wa laaa ilaaa ahlihim yarji'oon

textAr: وَنُفِخَ فِى ٱلصُّورِ فَإِذَا هُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِمْ يَنسِلُونَ
textEn: The Trumpet will be blown [again], and at once they will rush from their graves to their Lord.
textTranslit: Wa nufikha fis-soori faizaa hum minal ajdaasi ilaa Rabbihim yansiloon

textAr: قَالُوا۟ يَـٰوَيْلَنَا مَنۢ بَعَثَنَا مِن مَّرْقَدِنَا ۜ ۗ هَـٰذَا مَا وَعَدَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ وَصَدَقَ ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
textEn: They will say, “Woe to us! Who has resurrected us from our resting place?” [They will be told,] “This is what the Most Compassionate promised, and the messengers told the truth.”
textTranslit: Qaaloo yaa wailanaa mam ba'asanaa mim marqadinaa; haaza maa wa'adar Rahmanu wa sadaqal mursaloon

textAr: إِن كَانَتْ إِلَّا صَيْحَةً وَٰحِدَةً فَإِذَا هُمْ جَمِيعٌ لَّدَيْنَا مُحْضَرُونَ
textEn: It will only be a single Blast, and at once they will all be brought before Us.
textTranslit: In kaanat illaa saihatanw waahidatan fa-izaa hum jamee'ul ladainaa muhdaroon

textAr: فَٱلْيَوْمَ لَا تُظْلَمُ نَفْسٌ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا تُجْزَوْنَ إِلَّا مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
textEn: On that Day no soul will be wronged in the least, nor will you be recompensed except for what you used to do.
textTranslit: Fal-Yawma laa tuzlamu nafsun shai'anw-wa laa tujzawna illaa maa kuntum ta'maloon

textAr: إِنَّ أَصْحَـٰبَ ٱلْجَنَّةِ ٱلْيَوْمَ فِى شُغُلٍ فَـٰكِهُونَ
textEn: Indeed, on that Day the people of Paradise will be busy enjoying themselves,
textTranslit: Inna Ashaabal jannatil Yawma fee shughulin faakihoon

textAr: هُمْ وَأَزْوَٰجُهُمْ فِى ظِلَـٰلٍ عَلَى ٱلْأَرَآئِكِ مُتَّكِـُٔونَ
textEn: they and their spouses will be reclining on couches in the shade.
textTranslit: Hum wa azwaajuhum fee zilaalin 'alal araaa'iki muttaki'oon

textAr: لَهُمْ فِيهَا فَـٰكِهَةٌ وَلَهُم مَّا يَدَّعُونَ
textEn: They will have therein fruits and all what they ask for.
textTranslit: Lahum feehaa faakiha tunw-wa lahum maa yadda'oon

textAr: سَلَـٰمٌ قَوْلًا مِّن رَّبٍّ رَّحِيمٍ
textEn: “Peace”: a word from a Most Merciful Lord.
textTranslit: Salaamun qawlam mir Rabbir Raheem

textAr: وَٱمْتَـٰزُوا۟ ٱلْيَوْمَ أَيُّهَا ٱلْمُجْرِمُونَ
textEn: “Stand apart [from the believers] this Day, O wicked ones!
textTranslit: Wamtaazul Yawma ayyuhal mujrimoon

textAr: ۞ أَلَمْ أَعْهَدْ إِلَيْكُمْ يَـٰبَنِىٓ ءَادَمَ أَن لَّا تَعْبُدُوا۟ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنَ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ لَكُمْ عَدُوٌّ مُّبِينٌ
textEn: Did I not command you, O children of Adam, not to worship Satan, for he is your sworn enemy,
textTranslit: Alam a'had ilaikum yaa Baneee Aadama al-laa ta'budush Shaitaana innahoo lakum 'aduwwum mubeen

textAr: وَأَنِ ٱعْبُدُونِى ۚ هَـٰذَا صِرَٰطٌ مُّسْتَقِيمٌ
textEn: but to worship Me? This is a straight path.
textTranslit: Wa ani'budoonee; haazaa Siraatum Mustaqeem

textAr: وَلَقَدْ أَضَلَّ مِنكُمْ جِبِلًّا كَثِيرًا ۖ أَفَلَمْ تَكُونُوا۟ تَعْقِلُونَ
textEn: He had already misled great multitudes of you. Did you not then have sense?
textTranslit: Wa laqad adalla minkum jibillan kaseeraa; afalam takoonoo ta'qiloon

textAr: هَـٰذِهِۦ جَهَنَّمُ ٱلَّتِى كُنتُمْ تُوعَدُونَ
textEn: This is the Hell that you were promised.
textTranslit: Haazihee Jahannamul latee kuntum too'adoon

textAr: ٱصْلَوْهَا ٱلْيَوْمَ بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَكْفُرُونَ
textEn: Burn in it Today for your disbelief.”
textTranslit: Islawhal Yawma bimaa kuntum takfuroon

textAr: ٱلْيَوْمَ نَخْتِمُ عَلَىٰٓ أَفْوَٰهِهِمْ وَتُكَلِّمُنَآ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَتَشْهَدُ أَرْجُلُهُم بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ
textEn: Today We will seal up their mouths, and their hands will speak to Us, and their feet will testify to all what they used to do.
textTranslit: Al-Yawma nakhtimu 'alaaa afwaahihim wa tukallimunaaa aideehim wa tashhadu arjuluhum bimaa kaanoo yaksiboon

textAr: وَلَوْ نَشَآءُ لَطَمَسْنَا عَلَىٰٓ أَعْيُنِهِمْ فَٱسْتَبَقُوا۟ ٱلصِّرَٰطَ فَأَنَّىٰ يُبْصِرُونَ
textEn: If We willed, We could have taken away their sight, so they would rush to find their way, but then how could they see?
textTranslit: Wa law nashaaa'u lata masna 'alaaa aiyunihim fasta baqus-siraata fa-annaa yubsiroon

textAr: وَلَوْ نَشَآءُ لَمَسَخْنَـٰهُمْ عَلَىٰ مَكَانَتِهِمْ فَمَا ٱسْتَطَـٰعُوا۟ مُضِيًّا وَلَا يَرْجِعُونَ
textEn: And if We willed, We could have paralyzed them in their places, so they could neither move forward nor backward.
textTranslit: Wa law nashaaa'u lamasakhnaahum 'alaa makaanatihim famas-tataa'oo mudiyyanw-wa laa yarji'oon

textAr: وَمَن نُّعَمِّرْهُ نُنَكِّسْهُ فِى ٱلْخَلْقِ ۖ أَفَلَا يَعْقِلُونَ
textEn: Whomsoever We give a long life, We cause his strength to decline. Do they not then understand?
textTranslit: Wa man nu 'ammirhu nunakkishu fil-khalq; afalaa ya'qiloon

textAr: وَمَا عَلَّمْنَـٰهُ ٱلشِّعْرَ وَمَا يَنۢبَغِى لَهُۥٓ ۚ إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكْرٌ وَقُرْءَانٌ مُّبِينٌ
textEn: We have not taught him poetry, nor is it fitting for him. This is only a Reminder and a clear Qur’an
textTranslit: Wa maa 'allamnaahush shi'ra wa maa yambaghee lah; in huwa illaa zikrunw-wa Qur-aanum mubeen

textAr: لِّيُنذِرَ مَن كَانَ حَيًّا وَيَحِقَّ ٱلْقَوْلُ عَلَى ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ
textEn: so that he may warn those who are truly alive and establish the argument against the disbelievers.
textTranslit: Liyunzira man kaana haiyanw-wa yahiqqal qawlu 'alal-kaafireen

textAr: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ أَنَّا خَلَقْنَا لَهُم مِّمَّا عَمِلَتْ أَيْدِينَآ أَنْعَـٰمًا فَهُمْ لَهَا مَـٰلِكُونَ
textEn: Do they not see that We have created for them livestock made by Our Hands, and then they are their owners?
textTranslit: Awalam yaraw annaa khalaqnaa lahum mimmaa 'amilat aideenaaa an'aaman fahum lahaa maalikoon

textAr: وَذَلَّلْنَـٰهَا لَهُمْ فَمِنْهَا رَكُوبُهُمْ وَمِنْهَا يَأْكُلُونَ
textEn: And We have made them subservient to them; some they ride, and from others they eat,
textTranslit: Wa zallalnaahaa lahum faminhaa rakoobuhum wa minhaa yaakuloon

textAr: وَلَهُمْ فِيهَا مَنَـٰفِعُ وَمَشَارِبُ ۖ أَفَلَا يَشْكُرُونَ
textEn: and there are other benefits and drinks therein for them. Will they not then give thanks?
textTranslit: Wa lahum feehaa manaa fi'u wa mashaarib; afalaa yashkuroon

textAr: وَٱتَّخَذُوا۟ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ ءَالِهَةً لَّعَلَّهُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
textEn: Yet they have taken other gods besides Allah, hoping that they may be helped.
textTranslit: Wattakhazoo min doonil laahi aalihatal la'allahum yunsaroon

textAr: لَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ نَصْرَهُمْ وَهُمْ لَهُمْ جُندٌ مُّحْضَرُونَ
textEn: They cannot help them, yet they serve them as their dedicated guards.
textTranslit: Laa yastatee'oona nasrahum wa hum lahum jundum muhdaroon

textAr: فَلَا يَحْزُنكَ قَوْلُهُمْ ۘ إِنَّا نَعْلَمُ مَا يُسِرُّونَ وَمَا يُعْلِنُونَ
textEn: Do not let their words grieve you. Surely We know what they conceal and what they reveal.
textTranslit: Falaa yahzunka qawluhum; innaa na'lamu maa yusirroona wa maa yu'linoon

textAr: أَوَلَمْ يَرَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ أَنَّا خَلَقْنَـٰهُ مِن نُّطْفَةٍ فَإِذَا هُوَ خَصِيمٌ مُّبِينٌ
textEn: Does man not see that We have created him from a sperm-drop, then he becomes a clear adversary,
textTranslit: Awalam yaral insaanu annaa khalaqnaahu min nutfatin fa-izaa huwa khaseemum mubeen

textAr: وَضَرَبَ لَنَا مَثَلًا وَنَسِىَ خَلْقَهُۥ ۖ قَالَ مَن يُحْىِ ٱلْعِظَـٰمَ وَهِىَ رَمِيمٌ
textEn: producing arguments against Us while forgetting his own creation. He says, “Who can give life to the bones after they have crumbled to dust?”
textTranslit: Wa daraba lanaa maslanw-wa nasiya khalqahoo qaala mai-yuhyil'izaama wa hiya rameem

textAr: قُلْ يُحْيِيهَا ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنشَأَهَآ أَوَّلَ مَرَّةٍ ۖ وَهُوَ بِكُلِّ خَلْقٍ عَلِيمٌ
textEn: Say, “The One Who created them in the first place will give life to them, for He has full knowledge of every created being;
textTranslit: Qul yuh yeehal lazeee ansha ahaaa awwala marrah; wa Huwa bikulli khalqin 'Aleem

textAr: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱلشَّجَرِ ٱلْأَخْضَرِ نَارًا فَإِذَآ أَنتُم مِّنْهُ تُوقِدُونَ
textEn: the One Who made for you fire out of the green tree, with which you kindle your fires.”
textTranslit: Allazee ja'ala lakum minash shajaril akhdari naaran fa-izaaa antum minhu tooqidoon

textAr: أَوَلَيْسَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ بِقَـٰدِرٍ عَلَىٰٓ أَن يَخْلُقَ مِثْلَهُم ۚ بَلَىٰ وَهُوَ ٱلْخَلَّـٰقُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
textEn: Is not the One Who created the heavens and earth able to create the like of these [people]? Yes indeed, for He is the Creator of all, the All-Knowing.
textTranslit: Awa laisal lazee khalaqas samaawaati wal arda biqaadirin 'alaaa ai-yakhluqa mislahum; balaa wa Huwal Khallaaqul 'Aleem

textAr: إِنَّمَآ أَمْرُهُۥٓ إِذَآ أَرَادَ شَيْـًٔا أَن يَقُولَ لَهُۥ كُن فَيَكُونُ
textEn: Whenever He wills something to be, He only says to it, “Be”, and it is.
textTranslit: Innamaa amruhooo izaaa araada shai'an ai-yaqoola lahoo kun fa-yakoon

textAr: فَسُبْحَـٰنَ ٱلَّذِى بِيَدِهِۦ مَلَكُوتُ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ وَإِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ
textEn: So glory be to the One in Whose Hand is the dominion of everything, and to Him you will all be returned.
textTranslit: Fa Subhaanal lazee biyadihee malakootu kulli shai-inw-wa ilaihi turja'oon
